Enumeration Case# kSCSICDBSize_Maximum

Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.0+


## [Discussion](/documentation/iokit/1534764-command_descriptor_block_size/kscsicdbsize_maximum#discussion)

This is the largest size a Command Descriptor Block can be as specified in SPC-2.
